title: salix × schaburovii
intro: Salix × schaburovii, also known as Schaber's willow, is a hybrid of two willow species (Salix purpurea and Salix viminalis) and is native to Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and soothe sore muscles. The health benefits of Salix × schaburovii include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and easing digestive issues, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Salix × schaburovii can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and its extracts are often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
